power.method: Rechargeable 5000mAh battery (up to 120 days); optional solar panel

release_notes: Distinct SKU from the base Cell Go (IPC-TB3FP-3T0WE): the Full Color adds spotlight full-color night vision and active deterrence versus the base model's IR night vision. Specs from authorized-retailer datasheets (Imou spec table is JS-rendered).

frigate.notes: 100% wire-free battery camera — it sleeps between events and does not expose a continuous local RTSP stream, so Frigate/local-NVR use is not supported. Recording is via the Imou Life app + cloud and on-device microSD.
